subject: Re: GoldNet autopicking issue
body:
Hi Ruchao,

maybe you're working with Rtx 30xx series? If that's true, then it's a 
issue with the TF version.

Yours sincerely,
Linhua Tai
On Tuesday, February 1, 2022 at 3:47:57 PM UTC-5 pengrc...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi all,
>
> I am processing tomogram reconstruction in Warp following the standard 
> pipeline, but I am encountering some issues with GoldNet autopicking. It 
> seems that loading the GoldNet model (or other model in public repository) 
> is very slow, taking about 20-30min, during which the program is shown 
> not-responding. I found someone also reported this in previous discussions, 
> but seems no update for a solution for this yet.
> Also, after the model is loaded, it takes only 1-2 seconds to pick on one 
> image but actually nothing is picked. I also tried this on the testing 
> dataset (EMPIAR-10164) which also does not pick anything. For the testing 
> dataset, I have successfully run subtomgram averaging tasks without erasing 
> gold beads as this is not a real problem. However, this is really a big 
> issue for my real dataset.
> Does anyone also have similar issues and how to fix this?
>
> Thanks a lot!
>
> Best,
> Ruchao
>
